scripts.check:backend: node scripts/run-python.mjs -m py_compile backend/app.py && node scripts/run-python.mjs -m unittest backend.tests.test_debug_supernova_hardening backend.tests.test_commons_rate_limits
scripts.check:fe7: npm --prefix frontend-social-seven run lint && npm --prefix frontend-social-seven run build
scripts.check:release: npm run check:safe && npm run check:backend && npm run check:fe7
